method: 4-bit NF4 QLoRA SFT over canonical verified corpus, selected by validation and evaluated once on Benchmark V2
differences: changes the frozen base from Qwen2.5-1.5B to Qwen3-8B
requires at least 10,000 verified examples instead of microdatasets
uses a 500-plus-case canonical benchmark instead of 18-case experiment-family tests
uses one principal run plus one confirmatory replica rather than optimizer microsearch
requires GPU checkpoint resume and immutable data, tokenizer and environment manifests
expectedMechanism: A materially stronger pretrained base plus broad verified supervision should improve transfer across multiple capabilities; LoRA optimizer novelty is not the source of expected gain.
